Conjoint Analysis at Soochow University

蔡佳泓

2026-03-27

1 Introduction

2 Frequencies of Attributes

 key_vars <- c('Incumbent','Gender','Age','Education','Occupation','Party','Policy','profile')
 df_labeled <- mydata %>%
   select(any_of(key_vars)) %>%
   as_label()
 print(freq(df_labeled, plain.ascii = FALSE, style = "rmarkdown"))

3 Main Results

3.1 Figure 1

baselines <- list()
baselines$Policy <- "Majority"
res1 <- amce(data=mydata, choice ~ `Gender` + `Age` + `Education` +
               `Occupation` + `Party` + `Incumbent` +  `Policy`,
             respondent.id='person', baselines=baselines,
             cluster = T, na.ignore = T)
plot(res1,group.order = c("Policy", "Incumbent", "Party","Gender",
                          "Age","Education","Occupation"),
  xlab = "Change in Pr (Choosing the First Candidate (% Points))",
  breaks=c(-.2, -.1, 0, .1, .2), labels=c("-20","-10","0","10","20"),
  text.size=13)

Figure 1: Estimated AMCE

3.2 Figure 2

res3 <- amce(data=mydata, choice ~ `Gender` + `Age` + `Education` +
               `Occupation` + `Party` + `Incumbent` +  `Policy` +
               `PartyID` + `Party`:`PartyID`,
             respondent.id='person', respondent.varying = 'PartyID',
             cluster = F, na.ignore = T, baselines=baselines )
plot(res3,group.order = c("Policy","Incumbent", "Party", "Gender",
                          "Age","Education","Occupation"),
     xlab = "Change in Pr (Choosing the First Candidate (% Points))",
     breaks=c(-.2, -.1, 0, .1, .2), labels=c("-20","-10","0","10","20"),
     text.size=10)

Figure 2: Estimated AMCE by Partisanship
